headline: Why Meta’s Space-Based Solar Pact Is Really a Rocket Lab Story
summary: Meta Platforms’ (NASDAQ: META) pact to explore space-based solar power for its data center fleet is fundamentally a launch story. Beaming gigawatt-scale energy from orbit only works if you can deploy massive arrays cheaply and frequently, which puts the spotlight on launch economics and small-sat platforms. Several public companies sit somewhere on this stack. Here we ... Why Meta’s Space-Based Solar Pact Is Really a Rocket Lab Story

headline: Meta Teams Up With Overview Energy To Harness 'First-of-Its-Kind' Space Solar Power For Its Data Centers
summary: Meta partners with Overview Energy to bring space-based solar power to data centers, targeting orbital demo by 2028 and delivery by 2030.
